name: Boeing Company (The) Depositary Shares each representing a 1/20th interest in a share of 6.00% Series A Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock par value $1.00
summary: The Boeing Company is an aerospace company that manufactures commercial jetliners, defense, space and security systems, and provides aftermarket support. The company's segments include Commercial Airplanes, Defense, Space & Security, and Global Services, and it is headquartered in Chicago, Illinois. Boeing products and services include airplanes (passenger and freight), military aircraft, satellites, weapons, and related services.
